meeting_title: Bridge Mill Transport / Voxel Bi-Weekly Sync

safety_use_cases.label: Monitor freezer roll-up door open duration to prevent black ice
safety_use_cases.description: Track door open/propped-open duration on a freezer roll-up door to reduce black ice formation and isolate if the issue occurs at night.

evidence.quote: So we currently have a, you know, a certain issue with one of our roll-up doors.
evidence.speaker: Hollis Bishop <fake.hollis.bishop@bridgemilltransport.com>

evidence.quote: So, just the blower with it in the freezer is basically, it's causing a lot of black ice, right?
evidence.speaker: Hollis Bishop <fake.hollis.bishop@bridgemilltransport.com>

evidence.quote: So they can, you know, kind of take a look at the open door duration on that.
evidence.speaker: Hollis Bishop <fake.hollis.bishop@bridgemilltransport.com>

evidence.quote: But from my engine, what engineering is telling me is being propped open.
evidence.speaker: Hollis Bishop <fake.hollis.bishop@bridgemilltransport.com>

evidence.quote: If it is something that happens at night, where it's like kind of less visibility, then I can kind of, you know, track that.
evidence.speaker: Hollis Bishop <fake.hollis.bishop@bridgemilltransport.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Detect PIT–pedestrian proximity, PIT–PIT interactions, PPE compliance, and spills
safety_use_cases.description: Use Voxel to monitor person-to-PIT and PIT-to-PIT interactions, safety vests, and spills in relevant dock areas.

evidence.quote: It looks like a lot of what we're capturing is person-to-pit, pit-to-pit, and PPE.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: So, safety vests.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: So we'll do the, you know, just the, you know, person pit proximity, safety vest.
evidence.speaker: Hollis Bishop <fake.hollis.bishop@bridgemilltransport.com>

evidence.quote: Of course, pit to pit, spill.
evidence.speaker: Hollis Bishop <fake.hollis.bishop@bridgemilltransport.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Monitor improper PIT parking duration at central crossway and enforce policy
safety_use_cases.description: Track and address PITs left parked in aisles—especially at the central crossway—using coaching and write-ups supported by Voxel evidence.

evidence.quote: The one area I wanted to highlight with you was parking duration, because that saw a pretty sharp increase this past month.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: And it looks like, you know, far and away, the central crossway is the top offender.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: No, they're not supposed to.
evidence.speaker: Hollis Bishop <fake.hollis.bishop@bridgemilltransport.com>

evidence.quote: We coach them or we do a write-up, and it's the back and forth with the union on what's okay.
evidence.speaker: Hollis Bishop <fake.hollis.bishop@bridgemilltransport.com>

evidence.quote: once we have the coaching, the next time it's like, hey, we've already spoken, here's the incident, it's bookmarked. Now it's just a write-up, right?
evidence.speaker: Hollis Bishop <fake.hollis.bishop@bridgemilltransport.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Use Actions workflow for coaching and to measure impact on incidents
safety_use_cases.description: Assign and complete actions for safety incidents, use the platform to coach, and track the effect of completed actions on incident trends.

evidence.quote: we have our supervisors night and morning. assign them.
evidence.speaker: Hollis Bishop <fake.hollis.bishop@bridgemilltransport.com>

evidence.quote: Coaching and, you know, pretty much do what we can.
evidence.speaker: Hollis Bishop <fake.hollis.bishop@bridgemilltransport.com>

evidence.quote: If we see any issues, it normally comes up as like a little fire emoji on it.
evidence.speaker: Hollis Bishop <fake.hollis.bishop@bridgemilltransport.com>

evidence.quote: when you guys actually complete an action now, it adds a marker into your platform data.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: it shows, you know, after each particular incident and after each completed action, what is the effect thereafter on our data?
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Incident heat mapping to identify hotspots
safety_use_cases.description: Leverage heat mapping to understand where incidents occur most frequently within camera views for strategic prioritization.

evidence.quote: we can definitely make the next meeting a little bit more strategic in the sense that, like, we'll go into opportunity areas, we'll have the full group together.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: We can understand, you know, heat mapping, where do different incidents occur most frequently within your camera views
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Address PIT parking duration impacting aisle flow at central crossway
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Monitor and reduce PITs left parked in travel aisles at the central crossway to maintain flow and policy compliance using coaching and write-ups.

evidence.quote: The one area I wanted to highlight with you was parking duration, because that saw a pretty sharp increase this past month.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: And it looks like, you know, far and away, the central crossway is the top offender.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: No, they're not supposed to.
evidence.speaker: Hollis Bishop <fake.hollis.bishop@bridgemilltransport.com>

evidence.quote: We coach them or we do a write-up, and it's the back and forth with the union on what's okay.
evidence.speaker: Hollis Bishop <fake.hollis.bishop@bridgemilltransport.com>

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Reduce Chipotle dry dock congestion by splitting shifts
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Alleviate dock congestion by running the numbers on splitting shifts to reduce the number of pallets staged at once.

evidence.quote: we're working on some, alleviate some of the congestions that we have in Chipotle dry dock.
evidence.speaker: Hollis Bishop <fake.hollis.bishop@bridgemilltransport.com>

evidence.quote: that is something that I'm pretty much running the numbers on, splitting the shifts.
evidence.speaker: Hollis Bishop <fake.hollis.bishop@bridgemilltransport.com>

evidence.quote: So when that happens, it will be a lot less pallets on that stage.
evidence.speaker: Hollis Bishop <fake.hollis.bishop@bridgemilltransport.com>
